⚠ This PR deletes one or more tests — confirm each removal is intended. Full diffs are on GitHub (links below); this is the summary + plain-English note.

tests/companion-playlist.test.js

2 tests deleted assertions changed view diff on GitHub ↗
deleted: reorder/remove controls are edge-gated: first track has no ↑, last no ↓, both have ✕ editing stays live while browsing — remove POSTs and repaints
↳ Not a coverage cut. The two 'deleted' names were RENAMED, not dropped: the per-track reorder/remove chips moved from inline in the row into the ⋮ kebab popover, so those two tests now open the kebab first and were renamed to say so. Assertions went UP (67 → 85, +18) and nothing was weakened — plus 4 new TASK-328 tests (kebab present / no inline chips, icon-only popover with aria-labels, close-on-pick + tap-outside, edge-gating inside the popover).
